title: ALLCPR Smart Manikin / AUTOCPR / ICPIS SOP workflows
description: Redacted structured workflow layer from the July 1, 2026 staff-only SOP. Raw Section 21 codes/photos are excluded; access values stay in staff-gated logic only.

steps.title_en: Arrive and pause before touching setup
steps.title_zh: 到达后先暂停，不要触碰现场布置
instructions_en: Look at the whole room and the Smart Manikin station first. Do not clean, move, fix, or organize anything yet.
instructions_zh: Look at the whole room and the Smart Manikin station first. Do not clean, move, fix, or organize anything yet.
evidence_required: None yet; prepare to photograph the site in its found state.
if_problem: Photograph the problem if safe, note the exact issue, include it in the Weekly Site Check Report, and report to ALLCPR when unresolved.
do_not: Do not clean, move, fix, or organize before before photos.
Do not start repairs.
steps.source_ref: AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701 · Gosvea-2026-SOP-Auto CPR-ICPIS-01 · Section 4 · Step 1

instructions_en: Photograph the site before any cleaning or organizing: whole room; Smart Manikin area; supplies / consumables area; door or signage; any abnormal / problem area.
instructions_zh: Photograph the site before any cleaning or organizing: whole room; Smart Manikin area; supplies / consumables area; door or signage; any abnormal / problem area.
evidence_required: Before photos of the required areas.
if_problem: Photograph the problem if safe, note the exact issue, include it in the Weekly Site Check Report, and report to ALLCPR when unresolved.
do_not: Do not use old or staged photos.
Do not clean or move anything before these photos are taken.
steps.source_ref: AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701 · Gosvea-2026-SOP-Auto CPR-ICPIS-01 · Section 4 · Step 2

steps.title_zh: 桌面 / 训练站预检查
instructions_en: Before moving anything, take before photos, then compare with Figure 1.
Bag-Valve Mask / BVM optional; use if mask adaptors are unavailable
Items in standard placement / not scattered
iPad and Smart Manikin connected to power
instructions_zh: Before moving anything, compare the station to Figure 1 and confirm iPad, Smart Manikin(s), AED Training Pads, consumables area, tissues/simulated gauze if supplied, disinfecting wipes, disposable gloves, mask adaptors, optional face shield, Pocket Mask, BVM, iPad power, Smart Manikin power, and standard placement / not scattered.
evidence_required: Mark each item Present / Missing / Problem and photograph any missing or problem item if safe.
if_problem: Photograph the problem if safe, note the exact issue, include it in the Weekly Site Check Report, and report to ALLCPR when unresolved.
do_not: Do not invent replacements or repairs.
Do not dismantle or repair Smart Manikin / iPad / equipment.
Reference images are not repair instructions.
steps.source_ref: AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701 · Gosvea-2026-SOP-Auto CPR-ICPIS-01 · Section 4 · Step 3

instructions_en: Check overall hygiene. Empty trash and replace the bag if needed. Keep the floor clean and clear visible mess.
instructions_zh: Check overall hygiene. Empty trash and replace the bag if needed. Keep the floor clean and clear visible mess.
evidence_required: Cleanliness status recorded as OK / fixed / problem.
if_problem: Photograph the problem if safe, note the exact issue, include it in the Weekly Site Check Report, and report to ALLCPR when unresolved.
steps.source_ref: AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701 · Gosvea-2026-SOP-Auto CPR-ICPIS-01 · Section 4 · Step 4

instructions_en: Confirm disinfecting supplies are enough for one week. Disinfect teaching equipment. Note low or missing consumables such as wipes, gloves, and mask adaptors.
instructions_zh: Confirm disinfecting supplies are enough for one week. Disinfect teaching equipment. Note low or missing consumables such as wipes, gloves, and mask adaptors.
evidence_required: Supplies status and low/missing consumables recorded.
if_problem: Photograph the problem if safe, note the exact issue, include it in the Weekly Site Check Report, and report to ALLCPR when unresolved.
steps.source_ref: AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701 · Gosvea-2026-SOP-Auto CPR-ICPIS-01 · Section 4 · Step 5

instructions_en: Check Smart Manikin, iPad, AED Pads, BVM, and Pocket Mask are complete and working. Confirm iPad and Smart Manikin are connected to power and equipment is in the standard position.
instructions_zh: Check Smart Manikin, iPad, AED Pads, BVM, and Pocket Mask are complete and working. Confirm iPad and Smart Manikin are connected to power and equipment is in the standard position.
evidence_required: Equipment status recorded; photo of broken or unresponsive device if safe.
if_problem: Photograph the problem if safe, note the exact issue, include it in the Weekly Site Check Report, and report to ALLCPR when unresolved.
do_not: Do not invent replacements or repairs.
Do not dismantle or repair Smart Manikin / iPad / equipment.
Reference images are not repair instructions.
steps.source_ref: AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701 · Gosvea-2026-SOP-Auto CPR-ICPIS-01 · Section 4 · Step 6

steps.title_en: Access / camera / Wi-Fi / signage / safety checks
steps.title_zh: 门禁 / 摄像头 / Wi-Fi / 路牌 / 安全检查
instructions_en: Check door access status, camera online status, Wi-Fi status, signs/instructions, and visible water/electric/equipment hazards. Do not expose codes in the workflow.
instructions_zh: Check door access status, camera online status, Wi-Fi status, signs/instructions, and visible water/electric/equipment hazards. Do not expose codes in the workflow.
evidence_required: Access / camera / Wi-Fi / signage / safety status recorded.
if_problem: Photograph the problem if safe, note the exact issue, include it in the Weekly Site Check Report, and report to ALLCPR when unresolved.
do_not: Do not force doors, guess codes, or share access codes.
Do not expose passcodes in workflow or AI payloads.
steps.source_ref: AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701 · Gosvea-2026-SOP-Auto CPR-ICPIS-01 · Section 4 · Step 7

steps.title_zh: 安全范围内的简单处理
instructions_en: If an issue can be safely fixed on site, fix it and document what you did. If not, take photos and report promptly.
instructions_zh: If an issue can be safely fixed on site, fix it and document what you did. If not, take photos and report promptly.
evidence_required: Action taken recorded; before/after photos of the fix if any.
if_problem: Photograph the problem if safe, note the exact issue, include it in the Weekly Site Check Report, and report to ALLCPR when unresolved.
do_not: Do not dismantle or repair Smart Manikin, iPad, camera, access control, outlets, or network equipment.
steps.source_ref: AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701 · Gosvea-2026-SOP-Auto CPR-ICPIS-01 · Section 4 · Step 8

instructions_en: After inspection and cleaning are complete, photograph the site again from similar angles: whole room; Smart Manikin area; supplies area; door or signage; corrected result if an issue was fixed.
instructions_zh: After inspection and cleaning are complete, photograph the site again from similar angles: whole room; Smart Manikin area; supplies area; door or signage; corrected result if an issue was fixed.
evidence_required: After photos of the required areas.
if_problem: Photograph the problem if safe, note the exact issue, include it in the Weekly Site Check Report, and report to ALLCPR when unresolved.
steps.source_ref: AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701 · Gosvea-2026-SOP-Auto CPR-ICPIS-01 · Section 4 · Step 9

steps.title_en: Complete the Weekly Site Check Report
steps.title_zh: 完成 Weekly Site Check Report
instructions_en: Header: site name, site address, ICPIS / inspector name, inspection date, inspection time.
Weekly site status items, required photos, problems found, actions taken, whether ALLCPR support is needed, local promotion update, and weekly confirmation.
Everything must be truthful and complete.
instructions_zh: Fill the Weekly Site Check Report fields: header, weekly status items, required photos, issues found, local promotion update, and weekly confirmation.
evidence_required: Completed Weekly Site Check Report, truthful and complete.
if_problem: Photograph the problem if safe, note the exact issue, include it in the Weekly Site Check Report, and report to ALLCPR when unresolved.
do_not: Do not leave report incomplete.
Do not enter false info.
steps.source_ref: AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701 · Gosvea-2026-SOP-Auto CPR-ICPIS-01 · Section 4 · Step 10

instructions_en: Upload before photos, after photos, the completed report, and issue photos to the correct per-site Google Drive folder. The app records upload completed but does not manage Google Drive.
instructions_zh: Upload before photos, after photos, the completed report, and issue photos to the correct per-site Google Drive folder. The app records upload completed but does not manage Google Drive.
evidence_required: Upload/report completion recorded; confirm correct folder with staff when needed.
if_problem: Photograph the problem if safe, note the exact issue, include it in the Weekly Site Check Report, and report to ALLCPR when unresolved.
do_not: Do not upload old or staged photos.
Do not let the app pretend to manage Google Drive.
steps.source_ref: AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701 · Gosvea-2026-SOP-Auto CPR-ICPIS-01 · Section 4 · Step 11

instructions_en: Set final status: completed if no unresolved issue remains, needs_support if unresolved issue remains, or safety_escalation for safety issues. Include missing/problem counts.
instructions_zh: Set final status: completed if no unresolved issue remains, needs_support if unresolved issue remains, or safety_escalation for safety issues. Include missing/problem counts.
evidence_required: Final status recorded with missing/problem counts.
if_problem: Photograph the problem if safe, note the exact issue, include it in the Weekly Site Check Report, and report to ALLCPR when unresolved.
do_not: Do not mark completed while unresolved or safety issues remain.
steps.source_ref: AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701 · Gosvea-2026-SOP-Auto CPR-ICPIS-01 · Section 4 · Step 12

weekly_site_status_items: iPad / tablet is present and charging
AED pads / BVM / pocket mask are present
Camera is online and not blocked
issues_found: no issue / minor issue / urgent issue
local_promotion_update: local promotion/articles/Eventbrite/community posts/partner outreach this week
weekly_report_fields.weekly_confirmation: Site checked, cleaned, and reviewed for basic operation readiness; add name and date.
weekly_report_fields.upload_destination: Per-site Google Drive folder, not managed by app; workflow records upload completed and needs staff confirmation of correct folder.
do_not: Do not leave report incomplete.
Do not enter false info.
Do not upload old/staged photos.

if_problem: Report the visible issue to staff; photo/video only if safe.
do_not: Do not force entry, use staff-only access, move/reset/repair/dismantle equipment, handle Weekly Report, Google Drive upload, passcodes, lockbox codes, cleaning duties, or supply duties.
steps.source_ref: AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701 · Gosvea-2026-SOP-Auto CPR-ICPIS-01 · Section 5

instructions_zh: Submit quick report for staff review.

workflows.open_site_test_threshold: CPS ads 3 days including weekday and weekend; Google Ads 7 days; >5 signups in a week or 10 total may open, otherwise management decides.
hard_elimination_conditions: Access control cannot be installed or students cannot enter in a controlled way.
Camera cannot be installed or cover entrance and equipment area.
Wi-Fi/network cannot meet equipment needs and cannot be fixed by installing network.
Landlord/property uncooperative or limits access/camera/signage/equipment placement.
Educational/training use not allowed or lease terms block operation.
Room size, flow, or environment clearly unsuitable for independent student training.

if_problem: Needs staff/management review.
do_not: Do not self-approve lease, cost, renovation, equipment purchase, insurance, liability, safety, or operations decisions.
steps.source_ref: AutoCPR ICPIS SOP 20260701 · Gosvea-2026-SOP-Auto CPR-ICPIS-01 · Section 16

image_references.source_section_page: Section 6 / Figure 1; Smart Manikin site-inspection SOP page 3
image_references.title: Figure 1 — Standard equipment placement reference
image_references.what_it_shows: Standard Smart Manikin table/station placement: iPad, manikins, AED Training Pads, consumables, Pocket Mask, and BVM.
image_references.when_to_show: Table / station pre-check, equipment placement, supplies check, and desk/table layout questions.
image_references.caution: Reference only; do not repair or dismantle equipment.
image_references.what_user_should_compare: Compare the actual station or screen with the source-backed reference before moving equipment; report mismatches rather than repairing.
image_references.caution_notes: Reference only; do not repair or dismantle equipment.

image_references.title: Figure 2 — Example floor setup
image_references.what_it_shows: Example floor setup with manikin, BVM, pocket mask, AED pads, and tablet stand.
image_references.when_to_show: Station layout, equipment placement, and rescue-breathing item questions.
image_references.caution: Reference only; do not repair or dismantle equipment.
image_references.what_user_should_compare: Compare the actual station or screen with the source-backed reference before moving equipment; report mismatches rather than repairing.
image_references.caution_notes: Reference only; do not repair or dismantle equipment.

image_references.title: Figure 3 — Tablet home screen with two training apps
image_references.what_it_shows: Tablet home screen with Adult and Pediatric First Aid/CPR/AED and BLS Healthcare Provider training apps.
image_references.when_to_show: Student quick readiness and app launch questions.
image_references.caution: Use only to identify the expected app screen; do not change device settings.
image_references.what_user_should_compare: Compare the actual station or screen with the source-backed reference before moving equipment; report mismatches rather than repairing.
image_references.caution_notes: Use only to identify the expected app screen; do not change device settings.

image_references.title: Figure 4 — Normal Login / Continue screen
image_references.what_it_shows: Normal login / Continue screen expected when the app loads correctly.
image_references.when_to_show: Black tab, app not loading, or login/continue screen questions.
image_references.caution: Reference only; if a black tab remains after one reload, document and escalate.
image_references.what_user_should_compare: Compare the actual station or screen with the source-backed reference before moving equipment; report mismatches rather than repairing.
image_references.caution_notes: Reference only; if a black tab remains after one reload, document and escalate.

image_references.when_to_show: Bluetooth, session, Submit, Pass, and completion evidence questions.
